libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No special runtime setup is required. When repairing coverage, update tests to the current artemis-commons 2.38.0 APIs, e.g. Base64 exposes encodeObject(Serializable), encodeBytes(byte[]), encodeBytes(byte[], boolean), decode(String), and decode(String, boolean); DONT_BREAK_LINES and decodeToObject(String) are no longer present.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8665 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not add a compatibility dependency to recover the old Base64 API; the class is in artemis-commons itself and the API changed.

Meaningful coverage should remain focused on local utility classes such as buffers, JSON helpers, classloading/factory-finder resources, password masking, collections, and Base64 without requiring an external Artemis broker.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; the failure is caused by tests using Base64 APIs removed in artemis-commons 2.38.0.
